steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between Uros House and Ocupante.

steps.title: Find the choice that directly accomplishes this goal
steps.content:
B establishes that both artworks are LED light sculptures by Grimanesa Amoros, using parallel structure (“as is Ocupante”) to underscore the similarity.

  • A focuses on size differences
  • C explicitly contrasts the pieces
  • D mentions only one sculpture
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
